spec.name: The Front Of The Inn
spec.description: You are standing on a well-worn path which opens into a clearing. An old, wooden building is here with smoke billowing from its chimney. A painted sign is visible on the porch to the west. You could go north or south around the building or leave this place and return to the forest.

north.description: You can go north around the Inn.

east.description: Back through the trees to the Miden'nir.

south.description: You can go south around the Inn.

west.description: The front door of the Inn beckons.
